\tzpentry{ID5849}{Vimana Gyromagnetic Analysis Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5849 introduces Vimana Gyromagnetic Analysis Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \oint \mathbf{v} \cdot d\boldsymbol{\ell} = \frac{2\pi\hbar n}{m} \end{equation}
